title: Sneak peek: Vibe coding AI agents course with Kaggle
summary: Google Cloud Tech and Kaggle announced a 5-day intensive course on building autonomous AI agents using vibe coding, a natural language-first programming approach. The course covers agentic workflows, agent integrations with external APIs, agent-to-agent communication, and a capstone farming simulation project called Kaggriculture.
